catalog_url.notes: Demandware Search-Show endpoint renders product tiles server-side with GTM data embedded

list_page_url.notes: Full product listing in HTML. GTM data-gtm attributes contain complete product info.

detail_url_pattern.notes: URL includes category path, product slug, and numeric product ID

pagination.notes: 22 total results mentioned in page. No visible pagination links in first 48 products (likely all fit on one page). Demandware supports ?start=N&sz=N pagination.

api_response_sample.source: GTM data-gtm attribute on product tiles
api_response_sample.format: JSON embedded in HTML data attributes

sample_product.item_name: Athletic Essentials Stripe Jersey Polo Shirt

title.example: Athletic Essentials Stripe Jersey Polo Shirt

reasons: Rich GTM data embedded in product tiles provides title, price, color, category
Server-side rendered HTML works with requests mode
Consistent URL pattern with numeric product IDs
48 products per page with full field data
limitations: Size and description only available on detail pages
Image URLs use CDN with dynamic sizing parameters
Need to handle Demandware pagination for complete catalog
clm_suitability.recommended_approach: requests mode + GTM data extraction from data-gtm attributes

failure_diagnosis.notes: Superdry is one of the most accessible sites in this batch. GTM data provides rich product metadata directly in the listing page HTML.
